blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 254 ft. Looking ahead, 38 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Monday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
